title: Ulcerative colitis relief for caucasians through 11 herbal essential oils
description: Ulmus rubra essential oils have been studied for their potential benefits in managing ulcerative colitis. The oil contains properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds like phenolic acids, flavonoids, and terpenoids. These constituents may help reduce inflammation and protect the gut lining from damage, which is often seen in ulcerative colitis.
